titleStmt.title: SII 15.545: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 545. (B.K. No. 110 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing in the Siddharāmayya temple.

This inscription is engraved in continuation of No. 24 above (B.K. No. 109 � 1929-30), and bears the date, Pārthiva, Āshāḍha, ba. 10, Bṛihavāra, (i.e., Saturday), Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkrānti. As the earlier inscription is dated in 1142 A.D., the said cyclic year coming immediately after it would fall in 1165 A.D. The details, however, do not work out correctly for this year. In 1165, A.D., the above tithi corresponds to July 4, Sunday, but the said Saṅkrānti occurred on Āshāḍha ba. 1 or June 26, Saturday.

It records the remission of the tax baṇṇigedeṟe on the garden of the Prasannakēśava temple, by Hammarasa-daṇḍanāyaka, the adhikāri of Tarddavāḍi Thousand and the Karaṇas as paramēśvaradatti. A contract of araṇi-guttige of the garden was effected by the Mahājanas of the Brahmapuri with Hoṭṭeya Bammaṇa who was to supply garlands to the deity every day. Further gifts to the same deity by several individuals including the members of the trading guilds are also registered.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ī tōṭada baṇnigedeṟeyaṁ taddavāḍi sāyiradedhikāri haṁmmarasa daṁḍanāyakaruṁ samasta karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ pārtthiva saṁva
tsarada Āśāḍha bahuḷa daśami brihanāradaṁdu dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāṁtiyalu paramēśvaradatti yāgi śrī prasaṁna kēśavadēva
rgge sarvvanamasyaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . Ī tōṭadaraṇiguttagetanavanā dēvara brahmapuriya mahājanaṁgaḷa kayya
lu hoṭṭeya bammaṇanu paḍedu dēvargge niccavikkuva hosa hūvina hiriya māleya sara Ippattanālku yellā yēkādaśiyalikku
va daṁḍe prabhāvaḷiyaṁ pramāṇisalu mūṟu raṭṭavāsigavoṁdu caitradēkādasiyalikkuva daṁḍe Āṟu cāturmmāseyalu niccavikkuva bāsigavoṁdu
Ā yēkādaśigaḷa� daṁḍeyāṟu dēvarupahārakke sēveya bāḍukāyi vūṁdādaḍe haṁneraḍu kuṁbaḷada kāyādaḍe voṁdu yele
vāḍādaḍe voppiḍi yiṁtinisuva naḍasadiddaḍe Araṇiguttiganalli Otte dhāreyaṁ kuḍasella . mattaṁ sōvisaṭṭiyaru bāṇasugēriya teṁkadāḷige vaddadalu saṁ
baḷige yā cīmayyagaḷa maneyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvariṁ pattire mūḍalu mane kaṁmmaṁ hattumaṁ koravūrada nāraṇaśaṇaṁgi
yara maga Ādityadēvana kayyalu dhāregoṁḍu Ūraḍeya pramukha Aśēśamahājanaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu voraḍeyara mānyadōpādiyā
gi sarvvanamasyavāgi paḍedu śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvara pūjārigaṁ dēvara dēvaḍigaḷaṁ kaṭṭalu sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ śrī madutta
madagrahāraṁ muttageya sthaḷadi seṭṭiguttaruṁ nakharaṁgaḷuṁ śrī prasaṁnekēśavadēvara dē vaḍigaḷige guggarige hāneyaluṁ Aṁgaḍi
gaḷalu saṭṭugāyamaṁ biṭṭaru . matta yūraḍeya pramukha Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu kaihaṇa seṭṭiyara śrī ceṁnakēśava
dēvara dēguladalu sāṟineḍedēkastarāgi śrīmanu mahābaḍḍabyavahāri sōviseṭṭiyara śrīprasaṁnakēśavadēvara naṁdā
dīvige yeṇnege baḍagaṇa hebbāgiliṁ pattire mūḍalu baḍagi kaihana manayiṁ pattire paḍu palu śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvara gāṇadiṁ
pattira ba ṟe gāṇāyaṁ baṇnigedeṟe ki�kuḷa Āyadāya sahita sarbbana masyavāgi gāṇavo
ndaṁ nelasahita dhārāpūrbbakaṁ Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru
Digital edition of SII 15.545 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
